data.description: The queues screen currently shows all beats in a queued phase, including those where `isAgentClaimable` is false (e.g., human-gated steps, beats with `requiresHumanAction` set). This is inconsistent with the poll/claim path in `buildPollPrompt()`, which already filters to `isAgentClaimable === true` before claiming. The fix should propagate claimability filtering into the `applyFilters()` call that backs the queues list view so agents only see work they can actually claim.
